data.title: Apple's Alarm Issue Persists: iOS 18 Fails To Fix The Longstanding Problem Leaving Users Oversleeping
data.description: Apple faces criticism as iPhone users report persistent alarm malfunctions on iOS 18, despite previous promises to address similar issues.

data.title: Taiwan Semiconductor Hits $26.3 Billion Q4 Revenue, Reportedly Ends PowerAIR Deal Over Huawei Chip Breach Amid US Sanctions
data.description: TSMC reportedly ends collaboration with Singapore's PowerAIR after finding its chip in Huawei's AI processor; also faces US sanctions on Chinese customers.

data.title: Delta Takes Flight As Q4 Earnings Beat Expectations, Fueled By Premium Travel Demand And Efficiency Gains
data.description: Delta Air Lines shares rise after reporting strong Q4 2024 results. Adjusted operating revenue up 5.7%, adj. EPS up 44.5%, and adjusted operating cash flow of $1.8B. Outlook for 2025 shows growth and profitability.
